summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard capture of a legendary NYE 1971 show featuring Donna Jean’s debut and Jerry’s scorching guitar on “Next Time You See Me”.
review: The upgraded recording is praised for eliminating hum, delivering full‑bodied vocals and pristine clarity, making the entire 17‑song set easy to enjoy. Fans highlight the historic New Year’s Eve performance with Keith & Pigpen sharing the stage, Donna Jean’s first appearance, and Jerry Garcia’s inspired lead on “Next Time You See Me”. Overall sentiment is overwhelmingly positive.

ai_rating.rationale: All five reviews are 5‑star, consistently praising both the musical performance and the upgraded soundboard quality; the show is described as one of the best NYE concerts while the recording is noted as clean and listenable.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Hum eliminated, vocals are full‑bodied and clear, no noticeable dropouts; overall crisp and balanced mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A generous 17‑song set that flows well, mixing high energy numbers with historic moments (Donna Jean’s debut, Keith & Pigpen sharing the stage) and strong pacing throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His guitar work on “Next Time You See Me” is highlighted as especially powerful.
band_member_comments.Bob: A humorous on‑stage comment about a diaper is noted, but no specific musical critique.
band_member_comments.Keys: Keith’s piano contributions are praised; introduced as the new piano player.
